The Endowment and Minors’ Trust Foundation in Dubai (Awqaf Dubai) delivers exceptional investment performance during the first half of 2026, while continuing to enhance the efficiency of its securities investment portfolio. The portfolio’s market value increased to AED1.475 billion, representing growth of 5.5%. As part of its investment expansion strategy, new investments during the first half of 2026 totalled approximately AED285.11 million, representing growth of 150.65%, reflecting the Foundation’s continued implementation of its investment plans and diversification of its financial portfolios.

Dubai Health announces that a new cohort of seven Emirati doctors has secured residency training positions in North America for the 2026–2027 academic year, as part of its ongoing efforts to develop highly skilled national medical talent across a range of specialties, supporting the future of healthcare and strengthening the sector’s readiness. Dubai Health aims to support around 100 Emirati scholars in pursuing advanced training over the 10-year programme, helping to meet the evolving needs of Dubai’s healthcare sector.

The World Sports Summit, organised and staged by the Dubai Sports Council, hosted a special dinner in New York City on the sidelines of the ongoing 2026 FIFA World Cup. The event brought together a select group of international sports figures, decision-makers and leaders from sports, media and investment institutions. The dinner is part of a series of initiatives organised by the World Sports Summit to solidify its position as a leading international platform that brings together various stakeholders in the sports ecosystem.

القمة العالمية للرياضة (World Sports Summit) التي ينظمها مجلس دبي الرياضي، تنظم حفل عشاء خاص في مدينة نيويورك، على هامش نهائيات كأس العالم FIFA 2026، بحضور نخبة من الشخصيات الرياضية العالمية، وصناع القرار، وقادة المؤسسات الرياضية والإعلامية والاستثمارية. ويأتي تنظيم هذا العشاء ضمن سلسلة المبادرات التي تنظمها القمة العالمية للرياضة لترسيخ مكانتها منصةً دولية رائدة تجمع مختلف أطراف المنظومة الرياضية، وتوفر مساحة لتبادل الرؤى والخبرات.

A senior Iranian military commander warned the United States on Sunday that any further "aggression, bullying or savagery" would be met with a "decisive and devastating response" and would impose heavier costs.
Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and his Iraqi counterpart Fuad Hussein have emphasized the need for continued bilateral consultations and coordination to help preserve regional peace and security.
Iran warned the United Nations that continued U.S. air strikes on its territory constitute an "imminent threat to international peace and security."
The IRGC warned countries hosting U.S. military bases to prepare for retaliation, saying they bear responsibility for making their territory as launch pads for attacks on Iran.
